name: Corn Meal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: all-purpose flour, corn meal, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the boiling water, milk, corn oil, and beaten egg.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
5. Drop batter into the hot skillet, about 1/2 cup at a time, to form very small pancakes (about silver dollar size).
6. Cook pancakes for 1-2 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and cooked through.
7. Turn pancakes carefully with a spatula when ready.
8. Serve topped with sweetened strawberries or a little syrup. These have a great texture and are not as filling and heavy as ordinary pancakes.
Makes 25-35 pancakes.
